title: centrosema lobatum
intro: Centrosema lobatum, also known as sensitive plant, is a perennial legume native to South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. Its leaves and flowers have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, offering benefits such as reduced pain and improved immune function. Centrosema lobatum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
